narrative.headline: ⚠ 1 security finding — review before other cleanup. All T1 items cleared! (12 review findings — run `desloppify issues`)

actions.description: 12 review findings need investigation — run `desloppify issues` to see the work queue
11 flat_dirs findings — create subdirectories and use `desloppify move`
25 coupling findings — fix boundary violations with `desloppify move`
5 uncalled_functions findings — remove dead functions or document why they're retained
761 structural findings — decompose large files — extract logic into focused modules
6 props findings — split bloated components, extract sub-components
33 dupes findings — extract shared utility or consolidate duplicates
278 dict_keys findings — fix dict key mismatches — dead writes are likely dead code, schema drift suggests a typo or missed rename
1720 test_coverage findings — add tests for untested production modules — prioritize by import count
76 responsibility_cohesion findings — split modules with too many responsibilities — extract focused sub-modules
326 boilerplate_duplication findings — extract shared boilerplate into reusable helpers or base classes
11 unused findings — inspect with `desloppify next` and fix manually
1846 smells findings — inspect with `desloppify next` and fix manually
39 global_mutable_config findings — refactor module-level mutable state — use explicit init functions or dependency injection
2 private_imports findings — stop importing private symbols across module boundaries
52 stale_wontfix findings — re-evaluate old wontfix decisions — fix, document, or escalate
1 security findings — review and fix security findings — prioritize by severity

strategy.hint: 5 independent workstreams, safe to parallelize. Rescan after each phase to verify. Review: 12 finding(s) — `desloppify issues`.
